zh.Geislingen, Württemberg, Deutschland: 德國爾特波格奧拉赤 蓋斯林根
zh.Geislingen, Geislingen, Württemberg, Ger: 德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根庫陳
zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara Panthaleon於1560年10月24日在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 蓋斯林根受洗時，她的父親Paulus Panthaleon30歲，母親Anna Jäger29歲。她於1585年3月18日與Conrad Vetter在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 蓋斯林根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara Panthaleon于1560年10月24日在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 蓋斯林根受洗时，她的父亲Paulus Panthaleon30岁，母亲Anna Jäger29岁。她于1585年3月18日与Conrad Vetter在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 蓋斯林根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Panthaleon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Jose, Manuel, Mario, Juan, Aida, Alberto, Andres, Angel, Angelina, Angelita, Armando.
Spanish (Pantaleón): from the personal name Pantaleón, Greek Pantaleōn (see Pantaleo ).

variants.name: Pantaleo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Edvige, Gasper, Nunzio, Angelo, Antonio, Domenic, Enrico, Giacomo, Nicola, Romeo.

Italian: from the personal name Pantaleo, from Greek Pantaleōn, from pas ‘all’, genitive pantos, + leōn ‘lion’. In the original Greek form Panteleēmōn (from pas ‘all’, genitive pantos, + eleēmōn ‘merciful’), it was the name borne by a Christian saint said to have been martyred under Diocletian Nicomedia. He is the patron of physicians, having apparently been one himself. He was honored in the Eastern Church as early as the 5th century, but his cult did not reach the Western Church until the 11th century, when he was adopted as the patron saint of Venice. In the 14th century the Italian name Pantaleone came to be used for a character in the Harlequinade, a foolish old Venetian, and in some later cases the surname may have arisen as a nickname for someone who played the part of this character. It was from his prototypical costume that the term pantaloon came to be used to denote a type of loose-fitting breeches, whence the modern English word pants.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara Panthaleon was christened on 24 October 1560, in Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Paulus Panthaleon, was 30 and her mother, Anna Jäger, was 29. She married Conrad Vetter on 18 March 1585, in Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara Panthaleon a été baptisée le 24 octobre 1560, à Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Paulus Panthaleon, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Jäger, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Conrad Vetter le 18 mars 1585, à Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara Panthaleon am 24. Oktober 1560 in Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Deutschland getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Paulus Panthaleon 30 und ihre Mutter Anna Jäger 29. Sie hat am 18. März 1585 in Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Deutschland Conrad Vetter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Panthaleon è stato battezzato il 24 ottobre 1560 nel Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Paulus Panthaleon, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anna Jäger, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Conrad Vetter il 18 marzo 1585, nel Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.Suessen/Gingen, Neckar, Wuerttemberg, Ge: ドイツウuルッテンバーグ

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara Panthaleonが1560年10月24日にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ジェイスリンジェンで洗礼を受けた時，父Paulus Panthaleonは30歳，母Anna Jägerは29歳であった。1585年3月18日にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ジェイスリンジェンでConrad Vetterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Panthaleon(이)가 1560년 10월 24일 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 그이슬링에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Paulus Panthaleon(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Jäger(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1585년 3월 18일 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 그이슬링에서 Conrad Vetter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Panthaleon foi batizada em 24 de outubro de 1560, em Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Paulus Panthaleon, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Jäger, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Conrad Vetter em 18 de março de 1585, em Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara Panthaleon была крещена 24 октября 1560 г. в местности обирамт джислинген, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Paulus Panthaleon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Jäger, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Conrad Vetter 18 марта 1585 г. в местности обирамт джислинген, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barbara Panthaleon se bautizó el 24 de octubre de 1560, en Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Paulus Panthaleon, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna Jäger, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Conrad Vetter el 18 de marzo de 1585, en Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
